prompt_queue.prompt: Run the PR-first iterator against the grouped finding packet JSON supplied by the CI workload. The transformer primary workspaces are preloaded by the bundle; do not call workspace_clone for static-site-importer, html-to-blocks-converter, or block-format-bridge. Start from workspace_worktree_add for the target repository. Open focused upstream PRs with regression coverage when a safe patch path exists; use fallback issues only when evidence cannot support a safe patch. Workspace preparation is not completion: after successful workspace_worktree_add, use bounded inspection, then continue through workspace_edit, status, commit, push, upstream PR or fallback issue, and source PR callback. Do not spend the run repeatedly listing or rereading files; once raw-handler.php or another target file is identified, edit it.
